title: Calonemorchis macroclavia
taxonomy: Calonemorchis macroclavia is a species of orchid. It is a member of the subtribe Calonemorchidinae within the tribe Malaxideae. The subtribe Calonemorchidinae is classified under the family Orchidaceae. The family Orchidaceae is the largest family of flowering plants and is commonly known as the orchid family. Calonemorchis macroclavia is native to tropical regions of Southeast Asia.
